positive: An intricate, stylized graphic of a majestic woodland creature silhouette, specifically a stylized owl with outstretched wings, surrounded by lush, swirling bioluminescent forest leaves and mystical flora. The composition should be centrally focused, designed for high contrast and maximum visibility on fabric. The aesthetic is inspired by Art Nouveau and Japanese woodblock printing, using clean, graphic lines and a limited, earthy color palette (deep indigo, burnt orange, sage green). Strong, clean outlines are essential. Minimal background clutter, emphasizing the main subject. The overall mood is enchanting and elegant. Perfect for screen printing.
negative: photorealistic, complex textures, blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, gradient, soft edges
